text:
"You are the only one" is a song by Kotono Mitsuishi. It was published on the album Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack. https://vgmdb.net/album/22384 

It was originally recorded for the 1992 arrangement album Lilia~from Ys~ dedicated to the Ys video game series. https://vgmdb.net/album/4584 

Lyrics

!English
!Original

| width="33%" | 
Anata wo michibiku basho he to
Tori no mure ga habataite yuku
Kawaita daichi ni aru no wa
Hibiwareta takusan no kokoro

Kikoeru anata wo yobu koe ga
Zawameki nimo makenai hodo tsuyoku

You are the only one kitto anata dake
Tozasareta tobira hiraku no wa
You must fly away yume wo sutenai de
Kiseki okosu chikara wo shinjite

Kanashimi ni michita machi he to
Suna majiri no kaze wa fuite
Kasukana kibou no kakera mo
Maboroshi ni kaete shimau kedo

Kikoeru tenshi no utagoe ga
Mune ni himeta yuuki wo hibikasete

You are the only one sou yo anata dake
Afureteru namida sukuu no wa
You must fly away itsumo omotteru
Kiseki okosu chikara wo shinjite

You are the only one kitto anata dake
Tozasareta tobira hiraku no wa
You must fly away yume wo sutenai de
Kiseki okosu chikara wo shinjite
 
| width="33%" | 
To the place that will lead you
A flock of birds fluttering away
On dry land
Many cracked hearts

I can hear a voice calling out to you
Strong enough to withstand the noise

You are the only one
The closed door opens
You must fly away, don't throw away your dreams
Believe in the power to create miracles

To a town full of sadness
The sandy wind is blowing
A faint glimmer of hope
I'll turn it into an illusion

I can hear the angels singing
Let the courage hidden in your heart resonate

You are the only one
What saves the overflowing tears
You must fly away, I always think of you
Believe in the power to create miracles

You are the only one
The closed door opens
You must fly away, don't throw away your dreams
Believe in the power to create miracles https://www.musixmatch.com/lyrics/%E4%B8%89%E7%9F%B3%E7%90%B4%E4%B9%83/You-are-the-only-one/translation/english 
 
| width="33%" | 
あなたを導く場所へと
鳥の群れがはばたいてゆく
乾いた大地にあるのは
ひびわれた たくさんの心

聴こえる あなたを呼ぶ声が
ざわめきにも負けないほど強く

You are the only one きっとあなただけ
閉ざされた扉 ひらくのは
You must fly away 夢をすてないで
奇跡起こす力を 信じて

悲しみに満ちた町へと
砂まじりの風は吹いて
かすかな希望のかけらも
まぼろしに変えてしまうけど

聴こえる 天使の歌声が
胸に秘めた勇気を響かせて

You are the only one そうよあなただけ
あふれてる涙 救うのは
You must fly away いつも想ってる
奇跡起こす力を 信じて

You are the only one きっとあなただけ
閉ざされた扉 ひらくのは
You must fly away 夢をすてないで
奇跡起こす力を 信じて

Staff

Composition: Yuki Matsuura
Lyrics: Yuki Matsuura
Arrangement: Fumiki Ikema
Vocals: Kotono Mitsuishi

Discography
